name: Chocolate Covered Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the oleo to room temperature.
2. Cream together the oleo and cream cheese.
3. Add the confectioners' sugar and any additional flavorings.
4. Shape into eggs.
5. Place on a cookie sheet lined with waxed paper.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or overnight.
7. Melt the chocolate chips and paraffin wax together in the top of a double boiler.
8. Dip the eggs into the chocolate mixture to coat.
9. Yield: approximately 2 dozen small eggs.
